slashCommands.name: update-single-doc
slashCommands.description: Update one doc file to match codebase (enforces .tt format, verification, standards)

steps.command: echo 'Verify app state: Use codebase tools for controllers/routes relevant to {{params.docPath}} (e.g., Docker/Proxmox/themes). Ensure accuracy.'

steps.prompt:
Using Comserv Project Guide and Documentation Editing Standards context: Rewrite {{params.docPath}} to EXACTLY match the current codebase (focus on Docker/K8s, Proxmox, themes, routes/controllers). 

STANDARDS (MANDATORY):
- Output ONLY full .tt content in documentation_tt_template.tt format: TT headers ([% PageVersion %], debug check), containers (.primary, .info, .warning), metadata (Last Updated: current date | Version: increment | Author: Shanta | Status: Active).
- Unique navigation: Self-contained TOC with id='toc', absolute anchors (<a href='#section'>), app links (<a href='/Documentation/other'>).
- Verify accuracy: Reflect LIVE code—no assumptions (e.g., current Todo.pm routes, Proxmox API).
- Preserve tone/structure; add changelog refs if changed.
- .tt ONLY: If .md, merge and note deletion.
- Token-efficient: Use placeholders for unchanged sections.

Input content: {{readFile}}. Output ONLY the .tt file content.

steps.message: Updated {{params.docPath}} to match code. Summary: Rewritten for accuracy (e.g., updated routes/sections). Review in editor. If .md merged, confirm deletion.

slashCommands.name: sync-all-docs
slashCommands.description: Sync all Documentation files with codebase (prioritizes .tt; merges .md)

steps.message: All docs synced! Processed {{outputLines.length}} files. .md merged to .tt where needed. Run /init for overview. Key standards applied: .tt format, verification, navigation.

slashCommands.name: edit
slashCommands.description: Edit code (for .tt docs: enforce template standards)

slashCommands.name: test
slashCommands.description: Generate tests (include doc accuracy checks against codebase)

slashCommands.name: fix
slashCommands.description: Fix bugs (for docs: resolve mismatches like outdated routes)
